site.title: Albert Lecomte — Secure Infrastructure Administration
site.description: Transitioning to Secure Infrastructure Administration. Background in web development and UI design, admitted to AIS training at GRETA Colmar — seeking apprenticeship in Haut-Rhin.
hero.name: Albert Lecomte
hero.title: Transitioning to Secure Infrastructure Administration
hero.subtitle: Admitted to AIS program at GRETA Colmar — seeking apprenticeship in Haut-Rhin.
about.title: About
about.subtitle: From web development and UI design to system administration
about.p1: I come from web development and UI design. During my CDUI training, an infrastructure module changed everything: VMware server on Debian 13, SSH, MariaDB.
about.p2: Admitted to AIS (Secure Infrastructure Administration) training at GRETA Colmar for fall 2026, I am seeking an apprenticeship in the Haut-Rhin area.
about.p3: My background in web, design and development is a rare asset for system administration: I understand both technical requirements and the human side of things.
